formulas.name: Content
formulas.formula:
Since the "Keeping Quiet" chapter is part of the CBSE Class 12 English curriculum, it's a literary analysis and critical thinking-based chapter, not a math-based one. Therefore, I'll provide a JSON array with key statements and literary terms relevant to the chapter.

[
  {
    "name": "Imagery",
    "formula": "A vivid representation of sensory experiences through language",
    "variables": "Sensory details, figurative language, and descriptive language",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Helps to create a mental image of the scene or situation"
  },
  {
    "name": "Symbolism",
    "formula": "An object, color, or image that represents an abstract idea or concept",
    "variables": "Object, color, or image, abstract idea or concept",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to convey meaning beyond the literal interpretation"
  },
  {
    "name": "Allusion",
    "formula": "A reference to a person, place, event, or work of art that is outside the text itself",
    "variables": "Person, place, event, or work of art, text",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to create connections between the text and the reader's prior knowledge"
  },
  {
    "name": "Irony",
    "formula": "A discrepancy or incongruity between what is expected and what actually occurs",
    "variables": "Expected outcome, actual outcome",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to highlight the absurdity or contradiction in a situation"
  },
  {
    "name": "Foreshadowing",
    "formula": "A hint or clue that suggests events that will occur later in the text",
    "variables": "Event, hint or clue",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to build tension and create suspense"
  },
  {
    "name": "Juxtaposition",
    "formula": "The placement of two or more elements side by side to compare or contrast them",
    "variables": "Elements, comparison or contrast",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to highlight differences or similarities between elements"
  },
  {
    "name": "Stream-of-Consciousness",
    "formula": "A narrative technique that seeks to replicate the natural flow of thoughts and feelings",
    "variables": "Thoughts, feelings, and observations",
    "units": "N/A",
    "notes": "Used to create an immersive and introspective reading experience"
  }
]

Please note that these "formulas" are not mathematical equations but rather key literary terms and concepts relevant to the "Keeping Quiet" chapter in CBSE Class 12 English.
